text: mira's bedtime routine is bath, then story, then lights out, aiming for around 7:30pm — and her blue elephant is part of the comfort lineup for settling in. keeping that order consistent night to night helps her body anticipate sleep rather than negotiate it, since toddlers lean hard on predictable sequences to wind down. if bedtime's been drifting later lately, worth checking whether the window still fits her current nap schedule.
